# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "servicePrincipalName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "cicd-pipeline-sp",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Service Principal for CI/CD pipeline"
      }
    },
    "roleDefinitionId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Role Definition ID for Contributor role"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "contributorRoleId": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', parameters('roleDefinitionId'))]",
    "roleAssignmentName": "[guid(subscription().id, parameters('servicePrincipalName'), 'Contributor')]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-31",
      "name": "[parameters('servicePrincipalName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[variables('roleAssignmentName')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('servicePrincipalName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('contributorRoleId')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('servicePrincipalName')), '2023-01-31').principalId]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal",
        "scope": "[subscription().id]"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "servicePrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('servicePrincipalName')), '2023-01-31').principalId]"
    },
    "servicePrincipalClientId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('servicePrincipalName')), '2023-01-31').clientId]"
    },
    "roleAssignmentId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName'))]"
    }
  }
}
